assertions.assertion: A class extending DefaultProfileService or implementing IProfileService is defined
The GetProfileDataAsync method uses context.AddRequestedClaims() rather than directly adding all claims to IssuedClaims
The implementation checks for token exchange authentication method and forwards the JwtClaimTypes.Actor claim when present
assertions.rationale: Checks context.Subject.GetAuthenticationMethod() == OidcConstants.GrantTypes.TokenExchange and forwards JwtClaimTypes.Actor.

assertions.assertion: The profile service is registered via AddProfileService<T>() on the IdentityServer builder
